# Faber Local RC1 Packet

Version: `__DOCS_VERSION__`.

This full local corpus is assembled for evaluation. Public publication remains
gated.

## Sources

- `/llms.txt`
- `/docs/__DOCS_VERSION__/evaluate/index.md`
- `/docs/__DOCS_VERSION__/learn/index.md`
- `/docs/__DOCS_VERSION__/reference/index.md`

## Public Claim Rule

When this corpus conflicts with older local shell text, prefer the gated
Stage 1 packet: evaluate and learn are authorable now; install, public source,
live registry, public posting, deployment, analytics, and runnable example
claims remain blocked until their gates clear.
